ValidationRule.description: SAL25-247 - Partner Referral Fee CCRs should not be able to submitted for opportunities that have already closed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CCR_Validation_Rules__c), $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator", ISNEW(), ISPICKVAL(CCR_Type__c ,'Partner Referral Fee'), Opportunity__r.IsClosed )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Partner Referral Fee CCR can not be submitted for opportunities that have already closed.
